scenarios.title: Computer Vision Modeling and Augmentation
scenarios.when_to_read: Computer-vision utility, preprocessing, augmentation, model-building, OpenMMLab, or compiled vision-op tasks involving MMCV-style APIs.
scenarios.role: Use mmcv for OpenMMLab computer-vision foundations: image/video/flow utilities, dict-style transforms, PyTorch CNN builders, and compiled ops installation diagnostics.
scenarios.read_when: The user names MMCV, mmcv, mmcv-lite, OpenMMLab utilities, mmcv.transforms, mmcv.cnn, mmcv.ops, image/video/optical-flow helpers, transform pipeline dicts, ConvModule/build_layer configs, NMS/ROI/deformable ops, or errors such as No module named mmcv._ext.
scenarios.best_for: MMCV 2.2.0 package usage, media preprocessing, transform pipelines, CNN layer builders, package variant selection, and compiled ops troubleshooting.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid for downstream MMDetection/MMSeg model training recipes unless the task is specifically about MMCV APIs or install/build problems; avoid for generic Pillow/OpenCV/TorchVision tasks that do not use MMCV.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose mmcv when the task needs OpenMMLab MMCV APIs or package/build diagnostics; for overlapping computer-vision skills, choose mmcv over generic image libraries when transform registries, ConvModule builders, or mmcv.ops are central.
